Fraud Support
Powered by Financial Crime Management
Fraud Bot
via Kukua · Financial Crime Management
Report fraud in seconds — straight to the Financial Crime Management Team.
What you can do
Incident Reporting
Report a fraud case directly to the experts.
Flash Scenarios
Interactive fraud awareness & decisions.
Customer Awareness
Fraud types, red flags & prevention.
Shopping online? Use a virtual card
Fraud Trend Feed
Mobile money “wrong send” scamRISING
Callers claim they sent money by mistake and pressure customers to “return” it. Verify with the network before acting.
Phishing SMS posing as FidelityNEW
Texts with fake links asking for PIN/OTP. Fidelity never asks for your PIN or OTP, report and delete.
Impersonation of bank staffNEW
Fraudsters pose as “Fidelity officers” to extract credentials. Staff will never ask for a customer’s full PIN or password.
Urgent fraud? Reach us 24/7
Financial Crime Management · 0800 00 3355
Powered by Financial Crime Management & the Transformation Team
Reported.
Report an incident
This goes straight to the Financial Crime Management Team. Share what happened, every detail helps.
Type of fraud
Phishing / smishing
Mobile money scam
Card fraud
Impersonation
Identity theft
Other
What happened?
SCENARIO 1 OF 2
Flash Scenario
Customer Awareness
Know the common fraud types, the red flags, and how to keep customers safe.
Phishing & smishing
Fake emails/SMS with urgent links. Red flag: requests for PIN, OTP or password. Fidelity never asks for these.
Mobile money scams
“Wrong send” and prize tricks. Red flag: pressure to act fast or move money to “reverse” a transfer.
Impersonation
Callers posing as bank/officials. Red flag: caller already “knows” some details and asks you to confirm the rest.
Card fraud
Skimming & unfamiliar charges. Red flag: small “test” transactions before a big one, freeze and report early.

Reusable card
For everyday online shopping. Works until you freeze or terminate it.
